name: writbase
description: MCP-native task management for AI agent fleets. Persistent task registry with scoped permissions, inter-agent delegation, and full provenance.

tools.name: info
tools.description: Returns agent identity, role, permissions, and system metadata

tools.name: get_tasks
tools.description: List tasks with filtering by project, department, status, priority, and full-text search. Cursor-based pagination.

tools.name: add_task
tools.description: Create a new task in a permitted project/department scope

tools.name: update_task
tools.description: Update an existing task with optimistic concurrency control (version-based)

tools.name: manage_agent_keys
tools.description: List, create, update, deactivate, or rotate agent API keys (manager only)

tools.name: manage_agent_permissions
tools.description: Grant, revoke, or list permissions for agent keys with subset enforcement (manager only)

tools.name: get_provenance
tools.description: Query the append-only audit log for task and admin events (manager only)

tools.name: manage_projects
tools.description: Create, rename, or archive projects (manager only)

tools.name: manage_departments
tools.description: Create, rename, or archive departments (manager only)

tools.name: subscribe
tools.description: Register or manage webhook subscriptions for task event notifications (manager only)

tools.name: discover_agents
tools.description: List agents and their capabilities in a project, filterable by skill (manager only)
